title: South Harbor Parking During Construction
summary: In preparation for South Harbor construction the City of Cordova is asking that all vehicles parked in the lot on the southwestern side of the South Harbor and at the end of Nicholoff Way be removed no later than October 9, 2023 . title: Prize drawing results for NRC Shareholder Trust beneficiary vote
summary: On Sept. 27, NANA shareholders reached a historic milestone in amending the NANA Regional Corporation (NRC) Shareholder Trust, creating a shareholder permanent fund and changing the composition of the board of trustees. Cash prizes of $40,000 and either a 2024 Honda Rubicon or $10,000 were drawn for those shareholders who submitted valid ballots early and by the Sept. 27 deadline. Wi...

title: United States hog inventory up slightly
summary: As of Sept. 1, there were 74.3 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, up slightly from September 2022 and up 2% from June 1, 2023, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Inuelectrix: Gamifying the Rural Alaska Microgrid Experience
summary: Inuelectrix: Gamifying the Rural Alaska Microgrid Experience Introducing an Innovative Energy Video Game Collaboration in Kotzebue “Accessible only by plane or boat,” “roadless,” “the bush”—the usual descriptors for rural Alaska often proceed from the perspective of our state’s more populated centers. These labels tend to emphasize the remote and isolated nature of village life in Alaska. In contrast, many of the Alaska Native place names used to describe traditional population centers invoke images of community and vitality. Kikiktagruk is the Inupiaq name for what most of us know as the Northwest Arctic Borough hub community of Kotzebue. The word can be translated as “almost an island” and “the place for meeting.” This bit of wisdom is shared by a young computer science student and game developer named Kiana Norton,...

title: NANA shareholders hold historic NRC Shareholder Trust beneficiary vote, approve the creation of a shareholder permanent fund
summary: KOTZEBUE, ALASKA, Sept. 28, 2023 – Last evening, NANA shareholders overwhelmingly approved two amendments to the NANA Regional Corporation (NRC) Shareholder Trust, creating a shareholder permanent fund and changing the composition of the board of trustees. title: Flu vaccination opportunities
summary: The flu season has started early this year. The hospital is experiencing a significant rise in the number of influenza A cases.
